name: @socialproof/contra-bulletproofs-wasm
description: WASM bindings for MySo DST-aware bulletproof range proofs. Node-only entry at the root, browser build under ./web.

scripts.build:nodejs: wasm-pack build --target nodejs --release --out-dir nodejs --no-pack && rm -f nodejs/.gitignore
scripts.build:web: wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir web --no-pack && rm -f web/.gitignore
